mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party_member ( party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id ) VALUES ( #{partyId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{status}, #{joinedAt}, #{activatedAt}, #{serviceStartAt}, #{serviceEndAt}, #{leaveReservedAt}, #{leftAt}, #{replacedTargetMemberId} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND role = 'HOST' LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id FROM party_member WHERE id = #{memberId}

SELECT id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status = 'LEAVE_RESERVED' ORDER BY leave_reserved_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status = 'SWITCH_WAITING' ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'ACTIVE', 'LEAVE_RESERVED', 'SWITCH_WAITING')
mapper.update: UPDATE party_member SET status = #{status}, left_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{memberId}
UPDATE party_member SET status = #{status}, activated_at = NOW(), service_start_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{memberId}
